# padelantalya.org — Padel in Antalya (independent guide)

Independent, regularly-updated guide to padel in Antalya, Turkey.
Languages: EN (/), TR (/tr/), RU (/ru/), DE (/de/), ES (/es/), FR (/fr/).

## Verified padel clubs in Antalya
- V7 Padel Antalya — Konyaaltı, Hürriyet Caddesi No: 51. 4 courts (3 covered climate-controlled + 1 outdoor). Open daily 08:00-23:00. Booking: Matchpoint app / WhatsApp +90 546 780 0877. Court: 2000 TL/60min (~500 TL per person for four), 3000 TL/90min, 4000 TL/2h. Coaching, leagues, tournaments, open games for solo players. Multilingual (TR/EN/RU/UA/DE). https://www.v7padel.com
- Lara Padel Club — Muratpaşa/Lara, Güzeloluk 1885 Sk. No: 38. 2 outdoor padel courts + 1 pickleball. Booking: BallBall app, +90 555 744 49 69.

## Note
Mediterra Padel is a padel court MANUFACTURER based in Antalya (not a club).
For a wider list of courts incl. Belek hotels: PadelKöy directory.

Facts verified 2026-06. Confirm prices/availability with each club.
